prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
```pddl
(initialize_combat_slot strike_member_alpha)
(initialize_combat_slot support_member_alpha)
(initialize_combat_slot planner_agent_primary)
(initialize_combat_slot planner_agent_secondary)
(assign_ability_token strike_member_alpha ability_token_assault)
(attach_ability_component strike_member_alpha ability_component_core)
(prime_slot_for_combo strike_member_alpha ability_component_core)
(release_ability_component strike_member_alpha ability_component_core)
(assign_ability_token support_member_alpha ability_token_shield)
(attach_ability_component support_member_alpha ability_component_core)
(prime_slot_for_combo support_member_alpha ability_component_core)
(release_ability_component support_member_alpha ability_component_core)
(attach_ability_component strike_member_alpha ability_component_core)
(stage_left_flank_primary strike_member_alpha left_flank_node_a ability_component_core)
(release_ability_component strike_member_alpha ability_component_core)
(attach_ability_component support_member_alpha ability_component_core)
(stage_right_flank_primary support_member_alpha right_flank_node_a ability_component_core)
(release_ability_component support_member_alpha ability_component_core)
(attach_equipment_module strike_member_alpha equipment_module_sensor)
(arm_strike_member_with_module strike_member_alpha left_flank_node_a equipment_module_sensor)
(attach_ability_component support_member_alpha ability_component_core)
(assign_consumable_to_support_member support_member_alpha right_flank_node_a consumable_kit_alpha)
(finalize_support_flank_payload support_member_alpha right_flank_node_a ability_component_core consumable_kit_alpha)
(coordinate_flank_delivery strike_member_alpha support_member_alpha left_flank_node_a right_flank_node_a encounter_point_alpha)
(release_ability_component support_member_alpha ability_component_core)
(attach_ability_component strike_member_alpha ability_component_core)
(finalize_encounter_stage encounter_point_alpha strike_member_alpha ability_component_core)
(finalize_strike_member_combo strike_member_alpha encounter_point_alpha)
(finalize_support_member_combo support_member_alpha encounter_point_alpha)
(consume_recovery_resource strike_member_alpha recovery_pack_1 ability_component_core)
(redeploy_member_and_restock_token strike_member_alpha ability_token_assault recovery_pack_1)
(release_ability_component strike_member_alpha ability_component_core)
(attach_ability_component support_member_alpha ability_component_core)
(consume_recovery_resource support_member_alpha recovery_pack_1 ability_component_core)
(redeploy_support_member_and_restock_token support_member_alpha ability_token_shield recovery_pack_1)
(release_ability_component support_member_alpha ability_component_core)
(detach_equipment_module strike_member_alpha equipment_module_sensor)
(assign_ability_token planner_agent_secondary ability_token_heal)
(attach_ability_component planner_agent_secondary ability_component_core)
(prime_slot_for_combo planner_agent_secondary ability_component_core)
(install_tactical_module_on_encounter planner_agent_secondary tactical_module_beta encounter_point_alpha)
(arm_tactical_module_activation planner_agent_secondary tactical_module_beta encounter_point_alpha ability_component_core)
(planner_assign_special_gadget_a planner_agent_secondary special_gadget_a1)
(attach_equipment_module planner_agent_secondary equipment_module_sensor)
(prime_planner_module_for_activation planner_agent_secondary special_gadget_a1 equipment_module_sensor tactical_module_beta encounter_point_alpha)
(planner_assign_special_gadget_b planner_agent_secondary special_gadget_b1)
(prime_planner_with_special_gadget_b planner_agent_secondary special_gadget_b1 tactical_module_beta encounter_point_alpha)
(planner_finalize_without_synergy planner_agent_secondary)
(consume_recovery_resource planner_agent_secondary recovery_pack_1 ability_component_core)
(redeploy_planner_and_restock_token planner_agent_secondary ability_token_heal recovery_pack_1)
(release_ability_component planner_agent_secondary ability_component_core)
(planner_remove_special_gadget_a planner_agent_secondary special_gadget_a1)
(planner_remove_special_gadget_b planner_agent_secondary special_gadget_b1)
(detach_equipment_module planner_agent_secondary equipment_module_sensor)
(assign_ability_token planner_agent_primary ability_token_assault)
(attach_ability_component planner_agent_primary ability_component_core)
(prime_slot_for_combo planner_agent_primary ability_component_core)
(install_tactical_module_on_encounter planner_agent_primary tactical_module_alpha encounter_point_alpha)
(arm_tactical_module_activation planner_agent_primary tactical_module_alpha encounter_point_alpha ability_component_core)
(planner_assign_special_gadget_a planner_agent_primary special_gadget_a1)
(attach_equipment_module planner_agent_primary equipment_module_sensor)
(prime_planner_module_for_activation planner_agent_primary special_gadget_a1 equipment_module_sensor tactical_module_alpha encounter_point_alpha)
(planner_assign_special_gadget_b planner_agent_primary special_gadget_b1)
(prime_planner_with_special_gadget_b planner_agent_primary special_gadget_b1 tactical_module_alpha encounter_point_alpha)
(planner_finalize_without_synergy planner_agent_primary)
(consume_recovery_resource planner_agent_primary recovery_pack_1 ability_component_core)
(redeploy_planner_and_restock_token planner_agent_primary ability_token_assault recovery_pack_1)
```
message.reasoning:
The problem is a complex planning domain involving cooperative ability combo sequencing with units like strike squad members, support squad members, and planner slots. The goal is to reconfigure specific slots: strike_member_alpha, support_member_alpha, planner_agent_primary, and planner_agent_secondary.


## Examining the planning domain  
- The problem involves cooperative ability combo sequencing in a complex planning domain.  
- It includes units like strike squad members, support squad members, and planner slots.  

## Identifying reconfiguration goals  
- The goal is to reconfigure specific slots: strike_member_alpha, support_member_alpha, planner_agent_primary, and planner_agent_secondary.  
- This suggests a focus on optimizing team composition or role assignments.

## Identifying slot details  
- Slots include strike_member_alpha and support_member_alpha linked to slot_group_a, and planner_agent_primary and planner_agent_secondary linked to slot_group_b.  
- Planners are connected to both strike/support members and the encounter, with tactical modules alpha for primary and beta for secondary.  

## Exploring reconfiguration steps  
- Reconfiguration requires executing combos first, involving initializing combat slots, assigning ability tokens, and priming for combos.  
- After combo execution, slots need recovery resource consumption and redeployment to restock tokens and achieve reconfiguration.  

## Analyzing resource constraints  
- Limited resources include one ability_component_core, equipment_module_sensor, consumable_kit_alpha, and recovery_pack_1.  
- Resources like ability components and modules may need release and reuse, as redeployment restocks tokens but not necessarily components.  

## Checking planner actions  
- Planners install tactical modules on the encounter and are linked to priority markers, with priority_marker_2 initially unavailable.  
- Special gadget b1 is available, potentially aiding planner actions in reconfiguration.

## Exploring resource sharing  
- Only one ability_component_core can be bound at a time, requiring release and reattachment between slots for reuse.  
- Release_ability_component makes the component available again after use, allowing sequential binding to strike and support slots.  

## Planning combo execution  
- Both strike and support can execute finalize_member_combo independently after encounter_finalized, maintaining staged states.  
- Recovery for each requires consuming resources like recovery_pack_1, with redeployment restocking tokens but not affecting component binding.  

## Managing consumable resources  
- Consumable_kit_alpha is restocked during finalize_strike_flank_payload, making it available again after use.  
- Different payload staging methods, like arm_with_module, don’t involve consumables, offering flexibility in planning.

## Continuing resource planning  
- Four slots require tokens to prime for combos, but only three tokens (assault, shield, heal) are available, requiring sequential assignment.  
- Redeploy_member_and_restock_token restocks the used token, allowing cycling through units one at a time to prime and execute combos.  

## Examining encounter coordination  
- Encounter must be engaged and finalized once, with strike component binding required during finalization, then released for reuse.  
- Both strike and support can execute combos after encounter finalization, but recovery resources limit simultaneous actions, needing restocking between uses.  

## Detailing planner actions  
- Planner actions like finalize_planner_module_installation require both payloads staged and component binding, with synergy links enabling further steps.  
- Planner_finalize_with_check needs final_check_passed, triggering signoff and combo execution, while planner_finalize_without_synergy handles cases without synergy.

## Continuing planner actions
- Planner_primary executes combo after confirming priority with special_gadget_b1, maintaining component binding for recovery.
- Recovery uses recovery_pack_1 with component still bound, followed by redeploying planner_primary, restocking token_assault and recovery.

## Managing equipment and gadgets
- Component remains bound post-redeploy, requiring release_ability_component to make it available for other planners.
- Special_gadget_b1 stays linked to planner_primary after actions, with no restock option, limiting its use to one planner.

## Exploring planner limitations
- Only one special_gadget_b1 exists, and its link is planner-specific, preventing assignment to multiple planners.
- All planner signoff paths require special_gadget_b_link, suggesting no viable path without it for secondary planners.

## Analyzing Priority Marker Use  
- Priority_marker_1 is consumed permanently after application, with no action to remove or restock it.  
- Priority_marker_2 isn’t available initially, blocking the priority path for secondary planners.  

## Exploring Alternative Paths  
- Secondary planners can’t use priority paths due to missing markers, requiring other strategies like tactical installations.  
- Encounter engagement needs strike and support prepared, but only one special_gadget_a limits simultaneous priming.  

## Managing Resource Constraints  
- Both strike and support need to be primed with tokens and component binding, but only one component exists.  
- Sequencing preparations, like priming strike first with token1 and component, allows staged actions one at a time.

## Examining Encounter Coordination  
- Coordinating encounters like strike and support requires both stage_flags and payload_staged, but paths like full coverage don’t set payload_staged, causing issues.  
- For finalize_member_combo, payload_staged is essential, but full coverage relies on not having payload_staged, creating a contradiction.  

## Analyzing Payload Staging  
- Payload_staged can be achieved via arm_with_module, needing an equipped module, or finalize_flank_payload, requiring component binding and consumables.  
- Arm_with_module doesn’t need component binding after priming, but stage_left_primary for primary markers still requires it, limiting flexibility.  

## Exploring Resource Limitations  
- Only one equip module and one component exist, forcing sequential actions like priming strike, setting primary, then releasing the component for support.  
- Finalize_flank_payload restocks consumables but overwrites secondary with primary, complicating coordination for both strike and support simultaneously.

## Finalizing Encounter Coordination  
- Finalize_support_flank_payload sets priority right and payload_staged for support, aligning with strike’s setup.  
- Coordinate_flank_delivery engages the encounter, linking both strike and support, but coverage isn’t set.  

## Managing Component Binding  
- Component remains bound to support after finalize_support, requiring release and reattachment to strike for encounter finalization.  
- Finalize_encounter_stage and subsequent combo execution for both strike and support succeed with proper component binding.  

## Recovering Resources  
- Consume_recovery_resource and redeploy_member actions recover tokens and packs for both strike and support, restoring availability.  
- Equipment module remains equipped on strike, with option to detach if needed, while special gadgets remain unused.  

## Planning for Secondary Planners  
- Secondary planner lacks priority markers, forcing use of tactical installation on the now engaged and finalized encounter.  
- Tactical paths require additional setup, with tact_alpha and tact_beta available for coordination.

## Preparing Secondary Planner Setup  
- After strike and support are reconfigured, the equipment module remains equipped on strike but can be detached to free it.  
- Special gadgets (a1 and b1) and the equipment module become available after detachment, allowing setup for planner_agent_secondary with tactical_beta.  

## Initializing Planner Actions  
- Initialize combat slot for planner_agent_secondary, assign ability_token_heal, and attach ability_component_core to prime it for combo.  
- Install tactical_module_beta on encounter_point_alpha, ensuring it’s primed and meets all prerequisites like engagement and finalization.  

## Arming and Equipping Planner  
- Arm tactical_module_beta and link special_gadget_a1, ensuring component binding and proper installation on the encounter.  
- Attach equipment_module_sensor to planner_agent_secondary and prime it for activation, preparing for further gadget linkage.  

## Finalizing Planner Coordination  
- Link special_gadget_b1 and prime the planner module, confirming setup without synergy to finalize the combo execution.  
- Consume recovery resources and redeploy planner_agent_secondary, restocking ability_token_heal and recovery_pack to restore availability.

## Coordinating Flank Delivery  
- Stage payload for support_member_alpha on right_flank_node_a, setting priority and consuming consumable_kit_alpha.  
- Coordinate flank delivery between strike_member_alpha and support_member_alpha, linking left_flank_node_a and right_flank_node_a, and engaging encounter_point_alpha.  

## Managing Component Binding  
- Release ability_component_core from support_member_alpha and attach it to strike_member_alpha for encounter finalization.  
- Finalize encounter stage and execute combos for both strike and support members, ensuring component binding throughout.  

## Recovering Strike Member  
- Consume recovery_pack_1 for strike_member_alpha, restocking with ability_token_assault and redeploying.  
- Release ability_component_core from strike_member_alpha after recovery, making it available for further use.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
